testcase.name: completeOrderTest

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.id: finish' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.name: completeOrderTest

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //button[contains(text(),'Add to cart')]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
